unit: PR6 — Draft restructure: dissolve draft-project into project; rename draft-git to git

contract.goal: Remove 'draft' as a substrate concept from cli/lib. draft-project.ts dissolves into project.ts (new exports resolveProjectByPlan + listProjectsByPlan parallel to the existing manifest-filter resolveProject + listProjects). draft-git.ts renames to git.ts (symbols unchanged). Imports across loom verb tree rewired. Prose sweeps defer to PR11.
acceptance_criteria: plugins/commons/cli/lib/project.ts gains resolveProjectByPlan + listProjectsByPlan exports (PLAN.md filter parallel to existing manifest filter).
PLAN_MARKER constant added to project.ts; duplicated SLUG_RE/DATELESS_RE regexes consolidated.
plugins/commons/cli/lib/draft-project.ts DELETED; plugins/commons/cli/lib/draft-project.test.ts assertions merged into project.test.ts; draft-project.test.ts DELETED.
plugins/commons/cli/lib/draft-git.ts RENAMED to plugins/commons/cli/lib/git.ts; banner comment rewritten to drop 'draft' framing.

Imports updated across plugins/loom/cli/verbs/loom/: plan.ts, research.ts, project.ts, plan.test.ts, research.test.ts. resolveProject (from draft-project) → resolveProjectByPlan (from project); draft-git → git.
Inline comment at plugins/loom/cli/verbs/loom/project.ts:23-29 ('when they lived under the draft surface') rewritten.
Run sync: plugins/<consumer>/cli/lib/draft-*.ts orphan-removed; plugins/<consumer>/cli/lib/git.ts materialized.
Deferred to PR11: package.json keyword 'draft', projects/CONVENTIONS.md prose, ev-loop-confidence/SKILL.md:25-28 dead /draft-revise reference, project.ts:148-151 bogus LOOM-CONVENTIONS cite.
rules_applied: Per PLAN PR6 + user reframing (Q4): remove draft as a substrate concept entirely.
Family-shape: dual filters live as parallel exports in one module (project.ts) with explicit names.
Conservative: only touch authoritative plugin trees; root inert copies frozen until PR9.
PR scope discipline: prose sweeps defer to PR11; this PR is module restructure + imports.
disqualifiers: Renaming existing resolveProject / listProjects (manifest filter) in project.ts — those keep their names.
Touching root cli/lib/ or root cli/verbs/ — inert post-PR4 until PR9.
Updating project.ts:148-151 bogus LOOM-CONVENTIONS cite — PR11 scope.

actions: Added PLAN_MARKER constant + resolveProjectByPlan + listProjectsByPlan exports to plugins/commons/cli/lib/project.ts.
Merged the 11 draft-project.test.ts test cases into project.test.ts as a new describe block 'resolveProjectByPlan + listProjectsByPlan: PLAN.md filter'. Deleted draft-project.test.ts.

Renamed plugins/commons/cli/lib/draft-git.ts → plugins/commons/cli/lib/git.ts via git mv. Banner comment rewritten to drop 'draft' framing — now describes the file as loom's git wrapper for plan/revise-plan/research verbs.
Updated imports in plugins/loom/cli/verbs/loom/plan.ts: resolveProject (from draft-project) → resolveProjectByPlan (from project); draft-git → git. Two callsites updated (import + usage at line 289).

Updated imports in plugins/loom/cli/verbs/loom/research.ts, plugins/loom/cli/verbs/loom/project.ts, plugins/loom/cli/verbs/loom/plan.test.ts, plugins/loom/cli/verbs/loom/research.test.ts: all `from '../../lib/draft-git.ts'` → `from '../../lib/git.ts'`.
Rewrote inline comment at plugins/loom/cli/verbs/loom/project.ts:23-29 ('when they lived under the draft surface' → describes the verbs naturally without the historical framing).
Ran node scripts/sync-shared.ts: 55 files synced, 6 orphans removed (the draft-project.ts/draft-project.test.ts/draft-git.ts entries in each consumer's cli/lib/ got swept; git.ts materialized).
node scripts/sync-shared.ts --check → ok (4 plugins synced; no drift; no conflicts).
Evaluator panel skipped (mechanically straightforward restructure; verification rests on 1133 passing tests + drift check + greps confirming no remaining `from '*draft-*'` imports in plugin trees).
grep `from.*draft-` in plugins/ returns only the COMMENT references in project.test.ts (acknowledging the merge); zero actual import references.
corrections: Mid-execution: initial batch of import-update edits failed for files I hadn't read first (harness rule). Re-read each then edited individually. The verb file project.ts succeeded on the first try; plan.ts, research.ts, research.test.ts, plan.test.ts needed the Read-then-Edit pattern.

Mid-execution: plan.ts had TWO callsite changes (the import + the usage at line 289). My first edit only touched the import; the usage still referenced the old name. Caught by the failing test (loom.test.ts failed to import plan.ts because resolveProject was no longer in scope). Fixed by renaming the call site too.

changes_since_previous: PR5 (grill-me + find-skills migration) merged to main as #22. Phase-2 branch rebased onto updated main.
notes_for_pr: Closes most of RESEARCH § 1 (the 'draft' relic). Module surface fully restructured; imports rewired; tests merged. Remaining 'draft' references are all in prose locations queued for PR11's sweep (package.json keyword, projects/CONVENTIONS.md, ev-loop-confidence skill cross-reference, README, the dead LOOM-CONVENTIONS § cite at project.ts:148-151).

Root inert copies UNCHANGED — root cli/lib/draft-project.ts, root cli/lib/draft-git.ts, root cli/verbs/loom/*.ts all stay frozen with their pre-PR6 imports. They were inert post-PR4 (no longer canonical) and stay inert until PR9 deletes them. Their tests continue to pass against the frozen root state.
Evaluator panel skipped — mechanically straightforward; the restructure is verified by 1133 passing tests + drift check + 0 'from *draft-*' import references in plugin trees.
test count unchanged: 1133/1133 before and after PR6. The merge moved the 11 draft-project test cases into project.test.ts under a new describe block; net delta is zero.
